title: Array Technologies Q2 2024 Earnings Results
text: Array Technologies reported mixed set of financial results for second quarter of 2024, announcing $256 million in revenue with adjusted gross margin of 35% and adjusted EBITDA of $55.4 million. Array Technologies posted revenues of $255.77 million for quarter ended June 2024, surpassing Zacks Consensus Estimate by 11%. However, Q2 revenue was down 50% from 2023 but up 67% sequentially from Q1 2024. Company achieved $55.4 million in adjusted EBITDA and generated $1.8 million in free cash flow. Array Technologies reported earnings of $0.17 per share, beating Zacks Consensus Estimate of $0.14 per share, reflecting positive earnings surprise of 21.43%. Despite strong order book and robust supply chain, Array Technologies revised full-year 2024 guidance downward due to short-term project delays and other headwinds. Strong new bookings of $429 million were reported, but 2024 guidance reduced due to project timing delays and macroeconomic factors.
